title: Aragallus podocarpus
taxonomy: Aragallus podocarpus is classified as a member of the Fabaceae family, commonly known as the pea or legume family. This classification is based on its morphological characteristics, such as its fruit and leaf structure. Aragallus podocarpus is a small, perennial plant native to North America. Its classification is also supported by its genetic characteristics, which show a close relationship to other legume species. Further study is needed to confirm its exact classification within the Fabaceae family.
